# GameZipper Tools - Free Online Tools
> 80+ free browser-based tools for developers and creators. No signup, no download required.
> URL: https://tools.gamezipper.com

## Text Tools
- Case Converter: convert text between uppercase, lowercase, title case, camelCase and more — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/case-converter.html
- Word & Letter Counter: count characters, words, sentences and paragraphs — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/letter-counter.html
- Lorem Ipsum Generator: generate placeholder text for designs and prototypes — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/lorem-ipsum.html
- Markdown Preview: write and preview Markdown with live rendering — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/markdown.html
- Text Diff: compare two texts and highlight differences — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/diff.html
- Slug Generator: convert text to URL-friendly slugs — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/slug.html
- Bionic Reading: convert text to bionic reading format — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/bionic.html
- Handwriting Generator: convert text to handwriting-style image — https://tools.gamezipper.com/text/handwriting.html

## Dev Tools
- JSON Formatter: format, validate, minify and beautify JSON — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/json.html
- JSON Tree Viewer: visualize JSON as an interactive tree — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/json-tree.html
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder: encode and decode Base64 strings — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/base64.html
- Hash Generator: generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 hashes — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/hash.html
- Regex Tester: test and debug regular expressions with live matching — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/regex.html
- JWT Decoder: decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/jwt.html
- Cron Expression Builder: build and explain cron schedule expressions — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/cron.html
- UUID Generator: generate random UUIDs (v4) — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/uuid.html
- SQL Formatter: format and beautify SQL queries — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/sql.html
- HTML Encoder/Decoder: encode and decode HTML entities — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/html-encode.html
- URL Encoder/Decoder: encode and decode URL strings — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/url-encode.html
- Chmod Calculator: calculate Unix file permission values — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/chmod.html
- Timestamp Converter: convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates — https://tools.gamezipper.com/dev/timestamp.html

## Color Tools
- Color Picker: pick colors with HSL, RGB and HEX modes — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/picker.html
- Palette Generator: generate color palettes from a base color — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/palette.html
- Contrast Checker: check WCAG color contrast ratios for accessibility — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/contrast.html
- HEX to RGB Converter: convert between HEX and RGB color formats — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/hex-rgb.html
- Color Mixer: mix two colors and see the result — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/mixer.html
- Color Shades: generate tints and shades from any color — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/shades.html
- Color Blindness Simulator: simulate how colors appear to color-blind users — https://tools.gamezipper.com/color/blindness.html

## Image Tools
- Image Compressor: compress PNG, JPG and WebP images with quality control — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/compressor.html
- Image Resizer: resize images to custom dimensions — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/resizer.html
- Image Cropper: crop images with drag-and-select interface — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/cropper.html
- Image Converter: convert between PNG, JPG, WebP and GIF formats — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/converter.html
- Color Extractor: extract dominant colors from any image — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/color-extractor.html
- Watermark Tool: add text or image watermarks to photos — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/watermark.html
- SVG to PNG: convert SVG files to PNG images — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/svg-to-png.html
- Image Filters: apply CSS filters and effects to images — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/filters.html
- Code to Image: generate beautiful code screenshot images — https://tools.gamezipper.com/image/code-to-image.html

## CSS Tools
- CSS Gradient Generator: create linear and radial CSS gradients visually — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/gradient.html
- Box Shadow Generator: generate CSS box-shadow values with live preview — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/shadow.html
- CSS Minifier: minify and compress CSS code — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/minify.html
- Flexbox Playground: learn and test CSS flexbox properties interactively — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/flexbox.html
- Bezier Curve Editor: generate cubic-bezier values for CSS animations — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/bezier.html
- Glassmorphism Generator: create glassmorphism CSS effects — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/glassmorphism.html
- CSS Pattern Generator: generate CSS background patterns — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/pattern.html
- Border Radius Generator: generate CSS border-radius values visually — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/border-radius.html
- CSS Loader Generator: generate pure CSS loading spinner animations — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/loader.html
- Glitch Effect Generator: generate CSS glitch text effects — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/glitch.html
- CSS Triangle Generator: generate CSS triangle shapes — https://tools.gamezipper.com/css-tools/triangle.html

## Converters
- QR Code Generator: generate QR codes for URLs, text and contacts — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/qrcode.html
- Barcode Generator: generate 1D barcodes for various standards — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/barcode.html
- Unit Converter: convert between length, weight, temperature and more — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/unit.html
- Number Base Converter: convert between binary, octal, decimal and hex — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/number-base.html
- Color Format Converter: convert between HEX, RGB, HSL and other color formats — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/color.html
- Password Generator: generate strong random passwords — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/password.html
- Random Number Generator: generate random numbers with custom ranges — https://tools.gamezipper.com/convert/randomizer.html

## Social Tools
- OG Meta Tag Generator: generate Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags — https://tools.gamezipper.com/social/og-meta.html
- YouTube Thumbnail Downloader: download YouTube video thumbnails — https://tools.gamezipper.com/social/youtube-thumb.html
